stories.headline: What’s at stake in Benin’s presidential election?
stories.description: Finance minister is favourite to win on Sunday as incumbent Talon will step down after leading the country for 10 years.

stories.headline: Historic Vance-Ghalibaf talks must bridge deep mistrust
stories.description: Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution.

stories.headline: At least seven Palestinians killed in Israeli attacks on Gaza
stories.description: An early-morning strike hits a group of civilians in Bureij camp as drones attack a tent in Khan Younis.

stories.headline: Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks next week
stories.description: Talks due in Washington as Israeli attacks on Lebanon continue, Iran says ceasefire must include them.

stories.headline: Djibouti’s President Guelleh claims sixth straight term in office
stories.description: The longtime ruler, in power since 1999, has secured 97 percent of the vote, according to official results.
